prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ff72ca3e`.
codex_response:
`ff72ca3e` is implemented. The rule is: each `4` stays fixed and becomes the center of a filled square of `2`s, where the square radius is the nearest `5` in Chebyshev distance minus 1. The Opus hint was consistent and used; the Sonnet hint was discarded because it described asymmetric rectangles and mischaracterized the role of `5`s, documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ff72ca3e/notes.md#L1).

The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ff72ca3e/verifier.py#L6), the generator is in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ff72ca3e/generator.py#L18), and the task-local helpers are in [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ff72ca3e/helpers.py#L4). I did not add any shared `arc2/dsl_ext.py` primitive; the Chebyshev-distance and square/clip helpers are task-local only. The generator matches the task family by explicitly sampling non-overlapping square latents, placing each governing `5` on that square’s outer ring, then adding farther/equidistant `5` distractors with moderate board-size priors.

Validation passed: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task ff72ca3e` gave `5/5` official examples, and `python -m arc2.shared.build --task ff72ca3e --n-examples 1000` completed successfully. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ff72ca3e/task.json), [examples/](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ff72ca3e/examples), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ff72ca3e/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ff72ca3e/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ff72ca3e/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ff72ca3e/previews/preview_03.png). I also did a terminal-side raster sanity check of `preview_01.png`; it showed the expected repeated square-around-center motif rather than off-distribution noise.
